interaction.prompt: You lost the puck at the offensive blue line and the other team is breaking out. Skate to your backcheck spot.

feedback.right: Weak-side middle lane on the way back. You take away the cross-ice option for their winger and arrive ahead of the puck.
feedback.wrong: Don't chase the puck on a backcheck. Your job is to take away the OTHER side — middle lane to weak side.

tip: On a backcheck, take the LANE the puck-carrier wants to pass to. Don't chase the puck.
why: Backchecking is a defensive read, not a footrace. The carrier already has the puck — your job is to remove their best option.
